description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named vs2022 that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to master. Run three Windows 2019 jobs with different build configurations: one with VS2019 Debug and STL, one with VS2019 Debug and no STL, and one with VS2019 Debug, STL, and forced C++03. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, add msbuild to PATH, build with cmake and MSBuild, and run tests.
